description: Perform a weekly accounts payable workflow: (1) Create and Complete a new Vendor Invoice for 'Joe Block' for a 'Service' (or similar charge) totaling $150.00. (2) Create a Payment Selection batch (window: 'Payment Selection') to process this payment. The Payment Selection should use the 'HQ Checking' bank account. Use the 'Prepare' process to generate the payment lines and ensure the invoice you created is selected/included in the batch. Save the Payment Selection batch (it does not need to be printed/completed, just prepared with lines).
